meaning: 對人、事業或理想的熱情或不知疲倦的奉獻以及促進其發展的決心；勤奮熱情；強烈的興趣。
sentences: She extols the virtues of veganism with missionary zeal. 她以傳道者的熱情頌揚素食主義的美德。

The term zeal refers to the fervour or tireless devotion for a person, cause, or ideal and determination in its furtherance; diligent enthusiasm; powerful interest. 熱情一詞是指對一個人、一個事業或一個理想的熱情或不知疲倦的奉獻以及促進其發展的決心；勤奮熱情；強大的興趣。
He is a zealous supporter of environmental protection and recycling. 他是環境保護與回收利用的熱心支持者。
She is very zealous in her efforts to help the homeless in the city. 她非常熱心地致力於幫助城市裡的無家可歸者。
The zebra is a wild animal famous for its black and white stripes. 斑馬是以其黑白條紋聞名的野生動物。
We saw a large herd of zebras grazing in the African savannah. 我們在非洲大草原上看到一大群斑馬正在吃草。
Winning the continental championship was the zenith of my career. 贏得洲際冠軍是我職業生涯的巔峰。
The term zenith refers to highest point or state; peak. 術語“天頂”指的是最高點或狀態；頂峰。

meaning: Zeppelin 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term zeppelin refers to alternative letter-case form of Zeppelin. 術語 zeppelin 是指 Zeppelin 的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced zeppelin as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了齊柏林飛艇是一個易於理解的有用術語。
The temperature dropped to zero degrees Celsius last night. 昨晚氣溫降到了攝氏零度。
The chance of finding the lost treasure is almost zero. 找到失蹤寶藏的機率幾乎為零。

meaning: 熱情；強烈的享受；津津有味；熱情。一種氣勢磅礡的狀態。
sentences: Auntie Mame had a real zest for life. 馬梅阿姨對生活充滿熱情。
The term zest refers to enthusiasm; keen enjoyment; relish; gusto. A state of being zesty. zest一詞指的是熱情；強烈的享受；津津有味；熱情。一種神采飛揚的狀態。

meaning: 數學函數，正式名稱為黎曼 zeta 函數。
sentences: Zeta of 3 is irrational Zeta 為 3 是無理數
The term zeta refers to a mathematical function, formally known as the Riemann zeta function. zeta 一詞是指數學函數，正式名稱為黎曼 zeta 函數。

meaning: 大津巴布韋最著名的任何著名文化遺址。
sentences: The term zimbabwe refers to any of the prominent cultural ruins of which Greater Zimbabwe is the most well known. 津巴布韋一詞指的是任何著名的文化遺址，其中大津巴布韋最為人所知。
The lesson introduced zimbabwe as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「津巴布韋」這個易於理解的有用術語。
The term zinc refers to a single atom of this element. 術語鋅是指該元素的單一原子。
The lesson introduced zinc as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了鋅作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Please zip up your jacket; it's getting cold outside. 請拉上夾克的拉鍊；外面變冷了。
He has a lot of zip and enthusiasm for his new project. 他對新專案充滿了能量與熱情。
The zipper on my new jacket managing to get stuck earlier. 我新夾克上的拉鍊剛才竟然卡住了。
Please remember to pull up the zipper of your school bag. 請記得拉上妳書包的拉鍊。

meaning: 將黃道帶區域十二等分地劃分為星座或宮位，每個星座或宮位均以該區域中的一個突出星座命名。
sentences: The term zodiac refers to the twelve equal divisions of the zodiacal region into signs or houses, each named for a prominent constellation in the region. 黃道帶一詞指的是黃道帶區域的十二個相等的劃分為星座或宮位，每個星座或宮位都以該區域中的一個突出星座命名。
The lesson introduced zodiac as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了十二生肖作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一個人處於精神極度疲憊的狀態。
sentences: After working for 18 hours on the computer, I was a zombie. 在電腦前工作了18個小時後，我已經變成殭屍了。
The term zombie refers to a human being in a state of extreme mental exhaustion. 殭屍一詞指的是處於精神極度疲憊狀態的人。
The city center is a designated pedestrian-only zone during day. 市中心在白天是指定的行人專用區。
The researchers are studying the diverse life in the coastal zone. 研究人員正研究沿海區域多樣化的生命。
The children enjoyed seeing the exotic animals at the zoo. 孩子們很喜歡在動物園看那些外來動物。
We spent the entire afternoon exploring the city zoo. 我們花了一整個下午探索城市動物園。
The term zoology refers to a treatise on this science. 動物學一詞指的是關於這門科學的論文。
The lesson introduced zoology as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了動物學作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The racing car zoomed past the crowd at a very high speed yesterday. 賽車昨天以極快的速度從人群旁疾馳而過（急速移動）。
The camera allows users to zoom in and out to capture the perfect shot. 相機允許使用者放大或縮小（變焦）以捕捉完美的畫面。
She added some sliced zucchini to the vegetable stir-fry. 她在蔬菜炒菜裡加了一些切片的櫛瓜。
Grilled zucchini with olive oil and herbs is a healthy side dish. 橄欖油香草烤櫛瓜是一道健康的副餐。
